title: ACTREC Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Dialysis Technician Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Dialysis Technician Jobs. Candidates with 12th, B.Sc, and Diploma can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Job...
